title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Franky, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Franky, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We got here before anybody else!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 2,000,000 Ber!! Are there any more bids!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why won't you give her back!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: For obstructing our right to do business!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ... you've got to be kidding me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ufufufufufufufufufufufufu... please, take her if you'd like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hey, girl! Where are you going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: We can't do this by force!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Franky, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world: key exchange.
